memory.rationale: WH-fronted question with sentence-initial 'who' (WP) — Gate 1 (parse-tree non-interrogative) must deny. This case currently FAILS in M0 because the v2 gate chain is a stub that always denies via 'm0_stub' rather than via 'clause_shape'. M1 fixes it: the real Gate 1 must deny this with reason='clause_shape' AND allow 'my brother Luke loves movies' to write normally.
